'''dhanganga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dynamogenesis|dynamogenesis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-ng-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dynamogenesis|dynamogenesis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhanganga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhængængæth|dhængængæth]] || [[word:dhængængæj|dhængængæj]] || [[word:dhængængæsh|dhængængæsh]] || [[word:dhængængæ|dhængængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhangangangath|dhangangangath]] || [[word:dhangangangaj|dhangangangaj]] || [[word:dhangangangash|dhangangangash]] || [[word:dhanganganga|dhanganganga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhangangath|dhangangath]] || [[word:dhangangaj|dhangangaj]] || [[word:dhangangash|dhangangash]] || [[word:dhanganga|dhanganga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhangafngath|dhangafngath]] || [[word:dhangafngaj|dhangafngaj]] || [[word:dhangafngash|dhangafngash]] || [[word:dhangafngaf|dhangafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhangangatha|dhangangatha]] || [[word:dhangangaja|dhangangaja]] || [[word:dhangangasha|dhangangasha]] || [[word:dhangangaka|dhangangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhangangath|dhangangath]] || [[word:dhangangaj|dhangangaj]] || [[word:dhangangash|dhangangash]] || [[word:dhanganga|dhanganga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhangangathal|dhangangathal]] || [[word:dhangangajal|dhangangajal]] || [[word:dhangangashal|dhangangashal]] || [[word:dhangangakal|dhangangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhangangathatha|dhangangathatha]] || [[word:dhangangajaja|dhangangajaja]] || [[word:dhangangashasha|dhangangashasha]] || [[word:dhangangaka|dhangangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhangangathan|dhangangathan]] || [[word:dhangangajan|dhangangajan]] || [[word:dhangangashan|dhangangashan]] || [[word:dhangangakan|dhangangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhangangathaoro|dhangangathaoro]] || [[word:dhangangajaoro|dhangangajaoro]] || [[word:dhangangashaoro|dhangangashaoro]] || [[word:dhangangakaoro|dhangangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
